title: Fix subagent context contracts

tasks.title: Add report context anchor contract helper and schema classification tests
tasks.verification: Implemented schema-adjacent sub-agent report packet anchor classification and tests. Verification passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/types/subagent-reports.test.ts (12 tests).

tasks.title: Split review/harden scanner packets from remediation worker packets and pin asset tests
tasks.verification: Implemented review/harden scanner vs remediation packet split, updated engineer/reviewer prompt packet-field instructions, and pinned asset tests. RED evidence: asset tests failed before packet changes due missing scanner/remediation headings and anchors. GREEN evidence: pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts passed (101 tests).

tasks.title: Update subagent-report and delegation specs for packet/lane contract
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/subagent-reports-spec-assets.test.ts src/delegation-matrix.test.ts failed with missing rq-subagentReports05 and missing packet_contracts. GREEN: same command passed (25 tests) after updating subagent-reports and delegation-defaults specs plus asset tests.

tasks.title: Add durable agent-callable tool contract doc and globally synced skill guidance
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/agent-tool-contracts-assets.test.ts failed while docs/agent-tool-contracts.md and skills/adv-agent-tool-contracts/SKILL.md were missing, then failed while adv-skill-author lacked the cross-link. GREEN: same command passed (4 tests) after adding durable doc, globally synced skill guidance, skill-author cross-link, and asset coverage.

tasks.title: Add adjacent subagent-report guardrails without changing ingest semantics
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/temporal/change-state.test.ts src/tools/subagent-report.test.ts failed because blockerSummary lacked an exhaustive agent switch and the consumer warning test initially exposed output-shape mismatch. GREEN: same command passed (19 tests) after adding an exhaustive switch/assertNever guard, consumer warning schema validation, and warning shape tests.

tasks.title: Run focused verification suite and full check
tasks.verification: Focused suite passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/types/subagent-reports.test.ts src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts src/subagent-reports-spec-assets.test.ts src/delegation-matrix.test.ts src/agent-tool-contracts-assets.test.ts src/temporal/change-state.test.ts src/tools/subagent-report.test.ts (8 files, 161 tests). First pnpm run check failed on Prettier formatting only; ran pnpm run format and reran. Final focused suite passed again (161 tests). Final pnpm run check passed: typecheck, isolation checks, lockfile policy, lint, format:check.

subagent_reports.scope: Read-only independent acceptance review of typed sub-agent context contracts, scanner-vs-worker lanes, strict ingest, specs/docs/skills, and structural tests

tests_run: pnpm exec vitest run src/types/subagent-reports.test.ts src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts src/subagent-reports-spec-assets.test.ts src/delegation-matrix.test.ts src/agent-tool-contracts-assets.test.ts src/temporal/change-state.test.ts src/tools/subagent-report.test.ts
verification.evidence: Path preflight OK for all 21 referenced files. Reviewed schema/report ingest, command packets, agent prompts, delegation/subagent specs, docs/skills, and structural asset tests. Focused suite passed: 8 files, 161 tests. pnpm run check passed: typecheck, test-isolation check, lockfile policy, lint, format:check. git status --short produced no output after verification.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal checkpoint with reply `continue`; proposal validated and persisted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Agreement approved by user reply `approve -- make sure we have a clear doc and add to relevant global skill so we dont make a similar mistake when building agent callable tools again`; agreement persisted and contract minted with AC1-AC8.

design.approval_evidence: Design persisted; leverage scout completed; independent validator verdict VALIDATED. Pre-prep validation reports CONTRACT_AC_UNCOVERED because tasks are not created until planning.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep task graph with reply `approve`. Task graph has 6 tasks, contract coverage validates, design validator VALIDATED.

execution.approval_evidence: All six planned tasks completed with task checkpoints. Focused verification suite passed (161 tests) and pnpm run check passed after formatting-only remediation. adv_change_validate strict passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User approved acceptance with reply `approve`. Independent adv-reviewer verdict READY with 0 findings. Contract review matrix recorded 23 rows, 0 failing. Executive summary persisted.

items.text: `adv-reviewer` remediation packets include `WORKING DIRECTORY`, `CHANGE`, `TASK`, `PHASE`, and `ATTEMPT` anchors.
`adv-engineer` typed-worker packets include `WORKING DIRECTORY`, `CHANGE`, `TASK`, and `ATTEMPT` anchors.
`/adv-review` and `/adv-harden` scanner lanes remain non-persisted `explore` output contracts and do not claim `adv_subagent_report_submit` transport.
Asset/schema tests fail when report-required identity fields lack command-packet and agent-instruction coverage.
`subagent-reports` and `delegation-defaults` specs pin `PHASE`, `TASK`, `ATTEMPT`, and scanner-vs-worker lane distinction where under-specified.
Strict ingest remains intact: malformed persisted reports return `INVALID_REPORT`; unsupported reserved agents return `UNSUPPORTED_AGENT`.
Focused asset/schema tests and `pnpm run check` pass.

A clear durable doc is added for agent-callable tool / sub-agent context contracts, and the relevant globally synced skill guidance is updated so future tool/agent builders check schema, context packet, prompt, and tests together.
Use structural correctness first: Zod schemas, typed maps, parsers, asset tests, and spec anchors own enforcement where possible.
Do not weaken required report schema fields or accept missing `phase`, `attempt`, or `task_id` for typed persisted reports.
Keep `explore` scanners useful as read-only/non-persisted analysis workers.
Preserve `adv-engineer` and `adv-reviewer` no-nested-delegation and no-ADV-orchestration-mutation boundaries.
Include only small adjacent guardrails found during discovery when local, low-risk, and same-pattern.
Update specs now when implementation reveals under-specified packet/report contracts.
Do not redesign the full ADV delegation system.
Do not add persisted report support for `adv-researcher` or `adv-tron` in this change.
Do not migrate all scanner flows to typed persisted reports.
Do not introduce runtime packet generation unless design proves it simpler and safer than asset tests.
Do not rely on prose-only reminders as the recurrence-prevention mechanism.
Do not expand into unrelated review/harden verdict logic.
Full delegation routing redesign.
Persistent typed report schemas for `adv-researcher` and `adv-tron`.

Changing OpenCode built-in skill source outside this repository if it is not repo-owned; if the most relevant built-in skill is not editable here, update the closest repo-owned globally synced ADV skill and cite the limitation in the doc.

rows.evidence: Passed: src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts verifies Review/Harden Reviewer Remediation Packet anchors include WORKING DIRECTORY, CHANGE, TASK, PHASE, ATTEMPT.
Passed: src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts and src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts verify adv-engineer worker packets include WORKING DIRECTORY, CHANGE, TASK, ATTEMPT.
rows.notes: Engineer apply and remediation packets pinned.

rows.evidence: Passed: src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts scanner negative tests verify review/harden scanner packets do not mention adv_subagent_report_submit, ENGINEER_REPORT, or REVIEWER_REPORT.
Passed: src/types/subagent-reports.test.ts plus asset tests. Task RED evidence showed tests fail when required packet/spec anchors are missing.
rows.notes: Schema-required identity fields tied to packet/prompt tests.

rows.evidence: Passed: src/subagent-reports-spec-assets.test.ts and src/delegation-matrix.test.ts verify rq-subagentReports05 and packet_contracts for TASK, PHASE, ATTEMPT and scanner-vs-worker transport.
Passed: src/tools/subagent-report.test.ts verifies INVALID_REPORT for malformed payloads and UNSUPPORTED_AGENT for reserved agents; strict schemas still require task_id, attempt, and reviewer phase.
Passed: focused suite 8 files/161 tests. Passed: pnpm run check (typecheck, test-isolation, lockfile policy, lint, format:check).
Passed: src/agent-tool-contracts-assets.test.ts verifies docs/agent-tool-contracts.md, skills/adv-agent-tool-contracts/SKILL.md, adv-skill-author cross-link, and adv-* deploy sync.
rows.notes: Durable doc and globally synced skill guidance added.

rows.evidence: Implementation uses Zod schemas, typed packet anchor maps, spec JSON packet_contracts, and asset/schema tests. No heuristic ownership of ingest or persistence correctness added.
SupportedSubagentReport schemas still require task_id and attempt; ReviewerSubagentReport still requires phase. Tests assert malformed reports remain INVALID_REPORT.
Review/harden scanner packets remain explore analysis lanes and tests assert no adv_subagent_report_submit or typed report transport in scanner packets.
adv-engineer and adv-reviewer prompt updates only add TASK/PHASE/ATTEMPT mapping; no nested delegation or ADV orchestration mutation permissions were added.
Adjacent guardrails limited to exhaustive blockerSummary switch and consumer_warnings schema validation/tests in touched subagent-report subsystem.
.adv/specs/subagent-reports/spec.json adds rq-subagentReports05; .adv/specs/delegation-defaults/spec.json adds packet_contracts and scanner-vs-worker law.
No delegation routing redesign; changes stay in packet contracts, schemas, tests, specs, docs, and small guardrails.
SupportedSubagentReportSchema still includes only adv-engineer and adv-reviewer; adv-researcher/adv-tron remain reserved and UNSUPPORTED_AGENT test remains.
Scanner packet tests and specs explicitly classify explore scanners as non_persisted_scanner; no scanner migrated to typed persisted reports.
No runtime packet generation added; recurrence prevention is asset/schema/spec tests and typed maps.
Prose docs/skill were added, but enforcement is structural through tests, schemas, typed maps, and specs.
Review/harden verdict logic unchanged; command edits are limited to scanner/remediation packet sections and context instructions.
No full delegation routing redesign was attempted.
No persistent typed schemas added for adv-researcher or adv-tron.
Repo-owned globally synced ADV skill guidance was added; no external/built-in OpenCode skill source was modified.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv-reviewer` remediation packets include `WORKING DIRECTORY`, `CHANGE`, `TASK`, `PHASE`, and `ATTEMPT` anchors.
`adv-engineer` typed-worker packets include `WORKING DIRECTORY`, `CHANGE`, `TASK`, and `ATTEMPT` anchors.
`/adv-review` and `/adv-harden` scanner lanes remain non-persisted `explore` output contracts and do not claim `adv_subagent_report_submit` transport.
Asset/schema tests fail when report-required identity fields lack command-packet and agent-instruction coverage.
`subagent-reports` and `delegation-defaults` specs pin `PHASE`, `TASK`, `ATTEMPT`, and scanner-vs-worker lane distinction where under-specified.
Strict ingest remains intact: malformed persisted reports return `INVALID_REPORT`; unsupported reserved agents return `UNSUPPORTED_AGENT`.
Focused asset/schema tests and `pnpm run check` pass.

A clear durable doc is added for agent-callable tool / sub-agent context contracts, and the relevant globally synced skill guidance is updated so future tool/agent builders check schema, context packet, prompt, and tests together.
